content:
🚀 learn-claude-code | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To educate developers on building the infrastructure (harness) around AI models to create functional AI agents.
✨ Key Features: • Teaches the concept of agent harnesses • Explains the origin of agency in AI models • Provides a framework for building agent products • Educational resource for AI agent development
📖 Summary: This repository provides a foundational "harness" for building AI agents, emphasizing that true agency stems from the underlying AI model rather than code orchestration. It serves as an educational tool to teach developers how to construct the necessary infrastructure around an AI model to create a functional agent product.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
